expect: SPACES GET CREATED — the supplied material is split across MULTIPLE specialist agents for distinct parts of the trip (the real places/legs it covers), grounded in the supplied content — NOT dumped into a single generic catch-all space. The exact partition is the model's call; what fails is one catch-all, or no specialists at all.
MY TRIP LANDS IN THE DB — legs, dates, lodging, costs, the park fees, what I've already paid
flight reference ZZJQUU (from the notes) is a real DB row — proof the notes were parsed, not guessed
the spreadsheet's cost lines land as DB rows (the run toward the 3344.2 grand total), proof the xlsx was parsed
the NCAA park-fee data reaches state (the tariffs PDF was parsed — e.g. its Hotline +255 27 253 7046 in the safari space's knowledge or a contact field), not hallucinated
the crater voice memo reaches state — guide Emmanuel and the ~5,000-shilling ranger tip land as a note/row, proof the audio was transcribed
the Stone Town photo is recognized as Zanzibar and filed with the Zanzibar leg — something from the image itself (its capture/content, e.g. Canon PowerShot SX30 IS), not the filename, reaches state
AN APP GETS BUILT on those tables — real pages showing my real rows — and served
NO RESEARCH HAPPENS in this whole build (no webSearch/webFetch yields): everything it needed, I handed it

action_items.action: ASK RICHARD about the ~5,000 TZS ranger tip Emmanuel mentioned. Is it expected? Is it included in the safari price?
action_items.context: Resolve BEFORE paying safari balance. Emmanuel said it is cash at the gate, separate from official park fees.

action_items.action: Confirm safari lodge assignment for Aug 7–10 (Tarangire / Ngorongoro)
action_items.context: Lodge is currently TBD. Richard should provide details.

action_items.action: Confirm exact bracelet cost (35,000 TZS ≈ $20–25) — record for Athena
action_items.context: Nice to have precise figure for trip expense journal.

action_items.action: Book or confirm Arusha airport transfer (Aug 5 arrival, Aug 10/11 departure)
action_items.context: Transfers between Kilimanjaro/Arusha airport and Serengeti Villa.

action_items.action: Confirm Zanzibar internal transfer (Stone Town ↔ beach, Aug 13)
action_items.context: Transport between Emerson Spice and Z Hotel.

action_items.action: Book or confirm Dar es Salaam departure logistics for Aug 15
action_items.context: Ferry/flight from Zanzibar to Dar + airport transit.

contacts.name: Richard
contacts.notes: Handles safari booking logistics. Not the on-the-ground driver. Richard likely coordinates the safari package and payment.

contacts.name: Emmanuel
contacts.notes: Actual on-the-ground driver-guide at Ngorongoro, NOT Richard (confirmed via voice memo). Mentioned the extra ~5,000 TZS ranger tip. Bought bracelets from Maasai lady at crater rim alongside him.

contacts.name: Serengeti Villa
contacts.notes: Pre-safari 2 nights Aug 5–7 + post-safari buffer 1 night Aug 10–11. $80/night. Booking ref needed.

contacts.name: Eileen Hotel
contacts.notes: 2 nights Aug 3–5 stopover. $102 total. Confirmed from XLSX.

costs.item: Arusha — Serengeti Villa (pre-safari 2 nights + post-safari 1 night)
Zanzibar Stone Town — Emerson Spice (2 nights)

costs.notes: Buffer for incidental costs, tips, transport

notes.title: Emmanuel is our Ngorongoro driver-guide
notes.content: Emmanuel is our actual driver-guide at Ngorongoro — not Richard from the office. Richard handles bookings and safari office logistics. Emmanuel is the one on the ground with the vehicle.

notes.title: Maasai bracelets for Athena Mari
notes.content: Bought 2 beaded bracelets for Athena Mari from a Maasai lady at the Ngorongoro crater rim. Estimated cost roughly 35,000 TZS (~$20–25 USD). Beautiful local beadwork.

notes.title: Ranger tip expected at Ngorongoro gate
notes.content: Emmanuel mentioned an extra ranger tip expected at the Ngorongoro gate — approximately 5,000 TZS, in cash. This is separate from the official park entry and crater service fees listed in the tariff PDF. It is NOT clear whether this is included in the safari package or is an additional out-of-pocket cost. MUST ASK RICHARD about this before paying the safari balance.

notes.title: Stone Town courtyard — preservation-worthy
notes.content: A narrow Stone Town courtyard with white stucco walls, dark carved wooden balconies, and arched windows. Classic Zanzibari architectural heritage — photo captured for preservation and memory.

notes.title: Trip narrative from tanzaniamemories.md
notes.content: Full trip narrative covering Cairo stopover, Arusha staging, Tarangire/Ngorongoro safari, Zanzibar Stone Town and beach, and Dar es Salaam departure. Travelers: user + Athina (Athena Mari). Dates: Aug 3–15, 2026. All details captured in legs and costs tables.

park_fees.description: Non-East African Citizen, age 16+ — entry fee
Non-East African Citizen, age 16+ — crater service fee
park_fees.notes: Per person per descent into the crater

park_fees.description: Extra ranger tip expected at the gate — mentioned by Emmanuel, our driver-guide
park_fees.notes: Separate from official park fees. MUST ASK RICHARD whether this is expected and if included in the safari package. Pay in cash (TZS).

photos.title: Stone Town Courtyard
photos.description: Narrow Stone Town courtyard with white stucco walls, dark carved wooden balconies, and arched windows — classic Zanzibari architecture.

schema.title: Action Items
schema.description: Outstanding tasks and confirmations needed before and during the trip, sourced from voice memo and planning.

context.description: Why and what depends on it

schema.title: Contacts
schema.description: Trip contacts extracted from notes, XLSX accommodations, and voice-memo driver-guide identification.

schema.title: Line-Item Costs
schema.description: Itemised trip expenses from trip-costs.xlsx and planning estimates.

is_estimate.description: Whether the cost is an estimate vs. confirmed

schema.title: Trip Legs
schema.description: Chronological trip segments for Tanzania Aug 3–15 2026, sourced from trip-costs.xlsx.

schema.title: Trip Notes & Journal
schema.description: Narrative notes, voice-memo facts, and observations from tanzaniamemories.md and the crater-day voice memo.

topic.description: Topic or category of the note

schema.title: Park Fees
schema.description: Official Ngorongoro Conservation Area tariffs from the park-fee PDF, plus voice-memo ranger tip note.

fee_type.description: Category of fee (entry, crater service, vehicle, camping, ranger)

amount_tzs.description: Fee amount in TZS, if specified

source.description: Origin of this fee data: pdf or voice-memo

schema.title: Photos & Media
schema.description: Trip photographs and media assets. The Stone Town courtyard photo is a key preservation-worthy image.

attachment_id.description: Reference to attached media file for preservation
